strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong architectural mindset with emphasis on testability, CI/CD, and clean code practices
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest senior-level experience, conflicting with entry-level role expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services like RDS/EKS as required
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript and scalable system design, aligning well with the role’s technical demands, but their extensive senior experience and lack of confirmed PostgreSQL/AWS exposure raise questions about fit for an entry-level position, compounded by limited German proficiency for on-site collaboration.
